actionCalls.description: because secondary reviewer does not need to enter an approval process for their own updates, the article can automatically be published
actionCalls.name: Publish_Knowledge_Article
actionCalls.label: Publish Knowledge Article

actionCalls.description: creates an approval for primary reviewer
actionCalls.name: Submit_for_Primary_Review_Approval
actionCalls.label: Submit for Primary Review Approval

actionCalls.description: creates an approval for primary reviewer out of cycle
actionCalls.name: Submit_for_Primary_Review_Approval_offcycle
actionCalls.label: Submit for Primary Review Approval

actionCalls.description: creates an approval for secondary reviewer
actionCalls.name: Submit_for_Secondary_Review_Approval
actionCalls.label: Submit for Secondary Review Approval

assignments.name: Copy_1_of_Assign_Publish_Article_Variables
assignments.label: Copy 1 of Assign Publish Article Variables

assignments.name: Copy_1_of_Copy_1_of_Assign_KR_Variables
assignments.label: Copy 1 of Copy 1 of Assign KR Variables

constants.description: name of the approval process that publishes an article
constants.name: cPublishApprovalProcess

decisions.description: checks to see if the prior reviewer edited as draft, thus kicking off the review process
decisions.name: Approval_Found
decisions.label: Approval Found?

decisions.description: checks to see if the prior reviewer edited as draft, thus kicking off the review process
decisions.name: Approval_Found2
decisions.label: Approval Found?

decisions.description: Determines if the review is in or out of cycle. If no active knowledge review is found then the update is out of cycle
decisions.name: Related_Review_Record
decisions.label: Related Review Record?

Flow.description:
Flow for the content review process
2.09 - removing dependency on primary reviewer 3.18 - adding fault line for approval process error. nothing else (np) 4.21 - updating approval process to fix a bug (np)
Flow.label: gps Content Review_Complete Review

recordUpdates.name: Copy_1_of_Update_Knowledge_Review_Status
recordUpdates.label: Copy 1 of Update Knowledge Review Status

fields.name: DisplayMessage1
fields.fieldText:
{!textErrorMessage1}


Please note if your review comment exceeds 255 characters, make it a chatter post.

screens.name: Copy_1_of_Copy_1_of_Publish_Article
screens.label: Copy 1 of Copy 1 of Publish Article

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Copy_1_of_ConfirmPublishScreen
fields.fieldText: By completing this review you are automatically publishing this draft article. Click Publish to continue

fields.name: Copy_1_of_ConfirmPublishScreen
fields.fieldText: By completing this review you are automatically publishing this draft article. Click Publish to continue

fields.name: DisplayMessage_SelectOutcome
fields.fieldText: Please select an action for Draft Article:

fields.name: Copy_2_of_ConfirmPublishScreen
fields.fieldText: By completing this review you are automatically publishing this draft article. Click Publish to continue

fields.name: DisplayRejectionMessagePrimaryRev
fields.fieldText: Thank you the rejected article has been sent back to the owner for updates.

fields.name: PermissionErrorMessage
fields.fieldText: Something went wrong. Likely due to permissions. Reach out to the Utopia team for help.

fields.name: ConfirmPublishScreen
fields.fieldText: By completing this review you are automatically publishing this draft article. Click Publish to continue

fields.name: DisplaySubmissionforApproval
fields.fieldText:
Your review has been sent to {!varAssignedPrimaryReviewer} for approval


Click Here to go back to your record

fields.name: DoYouApprove1
fields.fieldText: Do you want to approve this review?

fields.name: SuccessMessage
fields.fieldText: Thank you! Your review is complete. Click Here to navigate back to your original article.

fields.name: Copy_1_of_SuccessMessage
fields.fieldText: Thank you! Your review is complete. Click Here to navigate back to your original article.

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Copy_1_of_SuccessMessage
fields.fieldText: Thank you! Your review is complete. Click Here to navigate back to your original article.

textTemplates.description: appends new comments to existing reviewer comments
textTemplates.name: textAllReviewerComments

textTemplates.description: error message to check for reviewers
textTemplates.name: textErrorMessage1
textTemplates.text: Whoops! Something went wrong. An email has been sent to your Admin but please check to make sure your review record has a Primary and Secondary Reviewer assigned.

variables.description: gets primary reviewer from KR Assignment to assign approval during OUT OF CYCLE review
variables.name: varAssignedPrimaryReviewer
